positive: A stylized, symmetrical forest scene featuring a majestic fox silhouette nestled among oversized, bioluminescent ferns and stylized flowering ginger plants. The overall mood is magical and whimsical, set against a deeply saturated indigo and emerald green color palette. The composition should be centered and highly detailed, with crisp, graphic linework defining the plant edges. Use strong backlighting to create dramatic contrast and perfect black silhouettes for the animals and main foliage. Minimalist kawaii style meets ornate nature art. Aspect ratio should favor textile printing.
negative: blur, low quality, noisy, text, signature, logo, trademark, watermark, ugly, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, artifacts, grain, jpeg artifacts, fuzzy, amateur
